Title: User Registration
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Valid email: john@example.com
- Valid password: Password123!
- Valid name: John Doe
- Valid surname: Smith
- Valid image URL: https://example.com/image.jpg
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the valid email, password, name, surname, and image URL.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- User is registered successfully.
- User is redirected to the login page.
- User details are stored in the database.

Title: Invalid User Registration
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Invalid email: john@example
- Valid password: Password123!
- Valid name: John Doe
- Valid surname: Smith
- Valid image URL: https://example.com/image.jpg
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the invalid email, password, name, surname, and image URL.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
- User is not registered.
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Add a Product
Preconditions: User is logged in as a seller
Test Data:
- Name: Product Z
- Category: Electronics
- Price: 99.99
- Description: High-quality electronics product.
- Expiry Date: 2024-12-31
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product addition page.
2. Click on the "+" button.
3. Fill in the product details.
4. Click on the "Add" button.
5. Confirm that all fields are correctly filled.
6. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- Product is added successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed.
- User is redirected to the product listing page.

Title: Invalid Product Addition
Preconditions: User is logged in as a seller
Test Data:
- Name: Product Z
- Empty category
- Price: 99.99
- Description: High-quality electronics product.
- Expiry Date: 2024-12-31
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product addition page.
2. Click on the "+" button.
3. Fill in the product details, leaving the category field empty.
4. Click on the "Add" button.
5. Confirm that the fields are not correctly filled.
6. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating required fields.
- User remains on the product addition page.

Title: Display Map
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: - User location: 40.7128, -74.0060 (New York City)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the map display page.
2. Check if the user's position is accessible.
3. If accessible, create a list based on the user's position.
4. If not accessible, report an error.
Expected Result:
- Map is displayed successfully.
- List is created based on the user's position if accessible.
- Error is reported if the user's position is not accessible.
